title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ISRO - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ISRO - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About ISRO:
ISRO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO!
